name: Endota Spa Mornington
signature: The Mornington village-side day spa — reliable therapists, sensible pricing, and the short-treatment option that fits before lunch on Main Street
editorNote:
Endota Mornington is the chain's bayside outpost, and for visitors working a Mornington town-centre weekend it is the most practical day-spa option on that end of the Peninsula. The treatment menu is identical to Sorrento's — endota branded skincare, targeted massage, facials, and couples rooms — and the real value is location: a short walk from Main Street restaurants, the farmers market, and the bayside foreshore.

This is not the spa to book if you want a full thermal bathing experience, a resort-style circuit, or a wellness retreat. Those live at Peninsula Hot Springs, Alba Thermal Springs, and One Spa at RACV Cape Schanck respectively. Endota Mornington is the sixty-to-ninety-minute treatment that makes a Mornington weekend feel more complete without committing a full half-day to wellness.

The best pairing: a Wednesday Mornington Farmers Market morning, a massage at Endota around midday, then a long lunch on Main Street. For anniversary weekends staying at a Mornington bayside hotel, a couples treatment here is the simplest wellness move — no drive, no parking issue, no restaurant time lost.

Bookings two to three weeks out for weekends, shorter notice on weekdays.
